subcodes.first_line: O musk-scented pilgrim! Sever thy attachment from all save God, and from this darksome cage [emerge] into the garden of eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس اللهدن بشقه هر کسدن میلنی کس و بو قفس ظلمانیدن حدیقه بقا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Shrines and Holy places, @law of pilgrimage, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
